scripts.build: corepack pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" build && corepack pnpm --filter @superise/owner-ui build && corepack pnpm --filter @superise/wallet-server build
scripts.clean: find apps packages -name dist -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" build && corepack pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter "./packages/**" --filter @superise/owner-ui --filter @superise/wallet-server dev
scripts.test: corepack pnpm build && find apps packages -type f -name '*.test.cjs' -print0 | xargs -0 node --test
